title: marsdenia calcicola
intro: Marsdenia calcicola, also known as the calcicola milkvine, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Marsdenia calcicola include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
